name: LLM
summary: Run local LLM completions and list models through llm:// URI routes.
description: LLM is an external urirun connector that runs chat completions and lists models as llm:// routes. Completions hit an external backend, so routes default to dry-run; pass --execute (or mode=execute) to call an Ollama-compatible endpoint (or point base_url at a litellm/OpenAI-compatible proxy for hosted models like Claude).
useCases: Run an LLM completion as a step inside a URI flow.
List available models on a local or proxied backend.
Project LLM access to MCP/A2A so agents can call models through URIs.
